dependency_context_notes: Present: specific files (PickerHandler.iOS.cs), class names (UIAlertController), method names (MapUnfocus, EditingDidEnd). Absent: exact line numbers, affected entry points in other files.
error_states_notes: Absent: what happens if UIAlertController is null, if dismissal fails, if focus cannot be restored. Partially present: implicit assumption that Done action will succeed.
behavioral_specificity_notes: Present: specific key sequences (Control+Option+Right/Space), specific UI elements (Project combo box, Category combo box), specific platform (MacCatalyst M2). Absent: timing constraints, retry logic, fallback behavior.
scope_boundaries_notes: Present: limited to PickerHandler.iOS.cs, MacCatalyst only. Absent: whether this affects other pickers, whether other platforms need changes, whether Category combo box fix is in scope here.
acceptance_criteria_notes: Partially present: repro steps exist and expected result stated (focus shift to expanded list), but no formal test cases, no verification for Category combo box mentioned in issue but not in PR, no non-functional acceptance criteria (performance, accessibility score).
outcome_clarity_notes: Present: focus should shift to expanded picker list when opened on MacCatalyst. Ambiguous: whether fix applies equally to Category combo box (mentioned in issue but not PR description), whether this is complete or partial solution, whether other Picker scenarios are affected.
